plainLanguageSummary: Field 17 needs a recent canopy observation before the fungicide preflight can be shown as evidence-sufficient.
whyThisMatters: The system should not present a compliance-relevant spray recommendation as complete without recent field condition evidence.
whatItBlocks: It blocks an evidence-sufficient compliance preflight under the named preflight gate.
whatItDoesNotBlock: It does not block ordinary advisory discussion, and it is not itself an obligation or evidence.
